chunks.text: Popular UPI Apps in India: PhonePe — 47% market share, backed by Walmart. Google Pay (GPay) — 35% market share, no transaction fee. Paytm — wallet + UPI, IPO listed. BHIM UPI — NPCI's official app, works on all bank accounts. Amazon Pay — UPI + wallet. WhatsApp Pay — integrated in WhatsApp, up to ₹1L/day. Daily transaction limit: ₹1 lakh standard, ₹2 lakh for verified accounts, ₹5 lakh for merchant/verified. No charges for peer-to-peer.

Common UPI Payment Categories and Merchants: Food & Dining — Swiggy, Zomato, Dominos, KFC. Transport — Ola, Uber, Rapido, Metro QR, RedBus, IRCTC. Groceries — BigBasket, Blinkit, Zepto, DMart. Entertainment — BookMyShow, PVR, Zee5, Hotstar. Shopping — Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Nykaa. Recharge — Jio, Airtel, Vi, BSNL. Fuel — IOCL, BPCL, HPCL petrol pumps. Medical — Apollo, 1mg, Netmeds. Finance — Zerodha, Groww, SBI mutual funds.

Digital Wallets & Prepaid Cards in India: Paytm Wallet — KYC required for > ₹10,000 balance. Amazon Pay — linked to Amazon account, cashback on purchases. PhonePe Wallet — for merchants. Prepaid cards: Niyo (forex), Fi Money (zero forex markup abroad), Jupiter (savings account + debit). Full KYC wallets: up to ₹1L balance. Load limits: ₹50,000/month. Use for: quick transactions, online shopping where UPI not accepted, expense tracking.

UPI Fraud Prevention: Never share UPI PIN or OTP — no bank/payment app asks for it. Collect request scam — fraudster sends collect request, you pay instead of receiving. QR code scam — scanning unknown QR codes causes payment outflow, not inflow. Customer care fraud — fake customer care numbers on Google. Steps if defrauded: report to bank within 3 days for zero liability, file complaint on NPCI portal, cybercrime.gov.in, or call 1930 (Cyber Helpline). RBI mandate: report within 3 working days.
